grant_name: The Hartford Adaptive Sports Equipment Grant
description: Grants to build adaptive equipment inventory and welcome new participants to adaptive sports programs
eligibility_criteria: Eligible organizations must be Move United members and demonstrate need for equipment

description: Grants for adaptive sports equipment, training, and competition costs for athletes with physical disabilities
eligibility_criteria: Individuals with permanent physical disabilities pursuing athletic endeavors

description: Grants to qualifying organizations to plan, develop, manage, and implement adaptive sports programs for disabled Veterans
eligibility_criteria: Organizations providing adaptive sports opportunities for disabled Veterans

description: Grants for adaptive sports equipment including sports wheelchairs, handcycles, mono skis, and prosthetics

description: One-time training grant for athletes competing in Paralympic sports

description: Grants to cover significant medical costs for elite Olympic and Paralympic athletes
eligibility_criteria: Elite Olympic and Paralympic athletes with medical needs

description: Financial and equipment grants for athletes with physical disabilities or visual impairments
eligibility_criteria: Athletes with physical disability or visual impairment interested in triathlon

description: Grants and scholarships supporting educational and athletic endeavors for individuals with disabilities

description: Support grants enabling Para athletes to compete at World Championships and major competitions

description: Grants for children with disabilities to obtain adaptive sports equipment
